    A wrapper for readr's read_csv & readxl's read_excel for reading trial data

    read_workbooks.Rd

    A wrapper for readr's read_csv & readxl's read_excel for reading trial data

    read_workbooks(
  dir = t_dir,
  season = "Season 2023",
  read_subfolder = FALSE,
  s = ".csv|.xlsx",
  sub_folder = "Data/Curated Data",
  subset = FALSE,
  n = NULL,
  multiple = FALSE,
  sheet_name = NULL,
  skip = 0
)

    Arguments

    dir

    trial data home directory

    season

    trial season

    read_subfolder

    logical. TRUE if data lives inside a subfolder in season

    s

    a regular expression used to keep relevant files

    sub_folder

    character of subfolder containing data e.g "Data/Curated Data"

    subset

    logical. TRUE if you want to read just a subset of files

    n

    integer. Number of files to subset e.g, 1, -1 1:4. negative prefix if you want to exclude a file at a specific index

    multiple

    logical. TRUE if you want to read nultiple excel sheets from the same workbook

    sheet_name

    character. used to specify excel sheet name of interest, e.g., "fieldbook"

    skip

    integer. number of rows to skip when reading data from an excel workbook

    Value

    a list of trial dataframes

    Contents

    Developed by Basil Okola.

    Site built with pkgdown 2.1.1.
